text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is when the strong strive to become
even stronger. Or so it should be. However...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Phew! How was my time, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Oooooh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think I say "really good," but the shrill screaming nearby drowns out my words. And my thoughts. And everything else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think I say "really good," but the shrill screaming nearby drowns out my words. And my thoughts. And everything else.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Fuji's been doing better and better ever since she
started her classic year!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe how lucky we are to have summer camp
with her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Fuji Kiseki started her classic year, her
popularity's shot up at the speed of a peregrine
falcon tearing toward its prey.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Sorry, there's usually a leader who helps
keep them in check.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But, since there's no one else training here
besides us, it should be fine for them to watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our days at summer camp continue amidst a
perpetual chorus of shrieking fans...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: All right, time for a break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Skitter, skitter, skitter.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Fuji! I bought the magazine you're on the cover
of! Your interview was incredible!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan B
text_block_list.text:
What, no way! How'd you get a copy? It was sold
out everywhere I went!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan C
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait until your senior year! I literally live to
see your races, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Um... Okay, dear ponies, why don't we all take a
step back and calm down now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A hoard of Umamusume rush toward Fuji Kiseki.
Things are getting dangerous, so I open my
mouth to tell them to back off, when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you lot! Fuji's tryin' to get ready for a big
race! You're all out of hand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon, the strong-willed dorm leader of
Miho Dorm, comes stomping up to us.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And you, Fuji! Don't just let 'em walk all over you!
You gotta tell 'em off when they get too rowdy!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha, thanks Hishiama... And sorry. I wasn't being
attentive enough.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Dear ponies, I'm so happy you're having fun, but I
have to focus on my training!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I think you've observed me enough. Can you
promise to focus on your own training now?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Good! I hope you're looking forward to the best
entertainment you've ever seen in your lives!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Swooon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the one hand, it's great how popular she is.
On the other... it's a bit frightening.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone believes in Fuji Kiseki right now. They
believe without a doubt that she can succeed.
choice_data_list:
(I hope all that expectation doesn't turn into
pressure...)

(I hope all that expectation doesn't turn into
pressure...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My anxiety only worsens over time. And then, one
evening...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hey, fancy meeting you here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You seem worried about something lately, so...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's that? There's something glittering
behind you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She ignores my bewildered reaction and reaches
behind my ear...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! I never expected to find a drink in such
a place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She produces a colorful drink from seemingly
nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Surprise! Are you thirsty?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You've been looking so worried lately, I wanted
to cheer you up.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? You can talk to me if you'd
like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to try to hide
anything from her. She's always been so sharp.
choice_data_list: I'm worried you're pushing yourself too hard.
I'm worried you're pushing yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So many expectations are on her, from the world
and her fellow racers. I tell her I'm worried she's
working too hard because of it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Is that what you've been fussing about all
this time?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to worry about. On the contrary,
I'm really happy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Plays and magic shows can only start after you've
got everyone's attention, you know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She carries on, speaking as gently and calmly as
she can.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I get so excited thinking about the sights I can
show everyone!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So, while I appreciate that you're always thinking
of me, there's no need for you to fret.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, take any apologetic feelings you may have
left and swallow them with your drink.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Urged by her soft smile, I gulp down the drink she
gave me, and a refreshing sweetness fills my
mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My worries haven't magically disappeared by any
means, but if I keep stressing out over Fuji Kiseki,
she'll end up fussing over me instead.
choice_data_list:
(I'll just have to believe in her and keep
supporting her.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's as if the sweet drink was enough to bolster my
confidence, and some of my worries fade away
like wisps of smoke.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There. You always look better when you smile.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh. I'd better get going. There's a dorm leader
meeting at six.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We'll be talking about our schedules, so I was
hoping you could join us today...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, but there's not much time before the meeting
starts. Okay, time for one of my secret tricks!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'm going to carry you to our meeting spot!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Or we could use a shortcut, but it has a pretty
steep hill so I won't be able to carry you up it.
What'll it be?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Okay, will do! Hold on tight!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Just tell me if you start getting scared!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Fuji Kiseki's great efforts, we manage
to make it to the meeting on time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Right. Let's do our best then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we begin climbing Fuji Kiseki's "steep
hill." Except it's not a hill—it's practically a cliff.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Give me your hand and watch where you put your
feet!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Look! See that light? That means we're almost
there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki pulls me up, and we somehow make it
in time!
